name: ai-weather-forecast-app
description: Full-stack AI-powered weather intelligence platform for PM Accelerator assessment.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run free:ports && npm run dev
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.audit:all: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --prefix backend --audit-level=moderate && npm audit --prefix frontend --audit-level=moderate
